description: Architecture contract for HxScaffoldSample. Enforced by the ArchUnitNET tests in test/HxScaffoldSample.Architecture.Tests (the families below are default gates run by `dotnet test`). This file is the human-readable contract and the cross-engine reference; it does not configure the tests (ArchUnitNET rules are expressed in code). Code-level security is additionally enforced by the .NET analyzer security rules in Directory.Build.props.

families.intent: The library namespace must not depend on the CLI namespace.
The library must not depend on the System.CommandLine CLI framework.
Classes named *Service reside in the library namespace.
[SerializableContract] DTOs reside in the library, not the CLI.
The namespaces are free of dependency cycles.

Security architecture / least privilege: the domain library must not depend on dangerous capabilities (process execution, networking, dynamic code generation). Those belong in the CLI or dedicated adapters.

Agent-first output: command logic returns the CliResult envelope and renders only through the Agent host (JSON-first); no CLI type except Agent writes to the console directly, so output stays one machine-consumable chokepoint.
